title: Amtech - Natural and Sustainable Jute Twine for Gardening, Home DIY, Crafts, and Gift Wrap, Biodegradable, Durable, Reusable and Tangle-Free (100m)
features: IDEAL PRODUCT: This natural jute twine is perfect for use in both the garden and the home
SUSTAINABLE: 100% natural, the twine is completely biodegradable, reusable, and eco-friendly
DURABLE: Soft but strong, the jute twine rope will support fragile items like flower stems without damaging them
LONG: The length of the twine means it can be used for a number of tasks
EASY TO USE: The string is easy to cut, and won't get twisted together
description: Product Description Amtech - 100m Natural Jute Twine is a must-have for any wrapping task. Soft and strong, the twine is ideal for a wide range of tasks in both the home and garden. It’s great for crafts, packaging, present wrapping, binding, and DIY projects. It’s also a great choice for supporting plants and for floristry, as the twine can support fragile items, like flower stems, without damaging them. With a 1.5mm diameter, the twine is easy to cut and won’t get twisted together for hassle-free tying and wrapping. Plus, the twine’s natural fibres are completely biodegradable and reusable for a sustainable alternative to synthetic materials. All our hand tools are backed by a three-year product replacement warranty if you are not satisfied with your tool. Safety Warning No
